categories.title: Categories
categories.subtitle: Organize products with categories and subcategories
categories.categoryNameTooltip: Enter a unique name for this category
categories.parentCategoryTooltip: Select a parent category to create a subcategory. Leave as 'Top Level' for a main category.
categories.statusTooltip: Set the category status. Inactive categories won't be visible in product selection.
categories.categoryImagesTooltip: Upload an image to represent this category. The image will be displayed in category listings.
categories.dropImagesOrClick: Drop images here or click to upload
categories.notesTooltip: Add any additional notes or description for this category
categories.displayOnStorefrontTooltip: Enable this option to make the category visible on your storefront
categories.offlineFallback: Category saved offline. Will sync when connection is restored. Reason: {{reason}}
categories.offlineCreated: Category created offline. Will sync when connection is restored.
categories.deactivateConfirmation: Are you sure you want to deactivate {{name}}? This action will mark the category as inactive but will not delete it.
categories.name: Name
categories.allActiveCategoriesStorefront: All active categories are now visible on the storefront.
